is your Lord there in the pillar? Now to nullify all the conditions which Hiranyakashipu had put,
the same Lord, Keshavadrita, Narahari Rupa, Jai Jagadisha. When the earth was inundated,
the same Lord, Keshavadrita, Narahari Rupa, Jai Jagadisha.
The same Lord took the form of a tortoise or that fish. So different, so they all are of Vishnu

they all are of same category. If you are a devotee of Lord Ramachandra, they all are same
category. They are all of Vishnu Tatva. And there's another Tatva called Jeeva Tatva. The
different Devi and Devatas are Vishnu Tatva or Jeeva Tatva. 33 crore Devi and Devatas are not

who is chief minister, somebody is a cabinet minister, somebody is a state minister, somebody
is a CEO of a company, somebody is a manager, somebody is a supervisor, somebody is a workman.
Different categories are there. Likewise, based on our empowerment by the Lord, based on our
Punya, we are empowered to different degrees by the Lord. And Devatas are empowered Jeevas.
